hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_desc: Block 3 continues. Show a guest around and say which area is number one: the busiest, the widest, the most important, the most modern. Short words add -est; long words use the most. A reading of the hospital map, two voice messages, and three role-plays. -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 18 -- Describing the Hospital Areas
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 18 -- Describing the Hospital Areas

reading.rtitle: The Hospital Map -- A Quick Tour
paras: Welcome to our hospital. This map shows the main areas. Reception is the busiest area in the building. Many people arrive here every morning.
The ICU is the most important ward. The team works there day and night. The east corridor is the widest corridor, so beds can pass easily.
The new pharmacy is the most modern part of the hospital. At night, the garden entrance is the quietest place. This is a simple tour, but it helps every guest.

reading.prompt: What is the best title for this text?
choices: The busiest doctor in the hospital
A short tour of the main hospital areas

items: Reception is the busiest area in the building.
The text says many people arrive there every morning.
The lab is the most important ward.
The text says the ICU is the most important ward.
The east corridor is the widest corridor.
The garden entrance is the loudest place at night.
It is the quietest place at night.

listenings.text: Hi Graziele, this is Doctor Carter. Welcome back to Block 3. Here is a quick map of the hospital. Reception is the busiest area in the building. The ICU is the most important ward. The east corridor is the widest corridor. And the new pharmacy is the most modern part. Tomorrow you show a guest around. Use the -est words and the most. You will do great.

Hi Graziele, it is Ana. A quick tip before you show the guest around. To say something is number one, use the superlative. For short words like busy and wide, add -est: the busiest, the widest. For long words like important and modern, use the most: the most important, the most modern. Always put the before it. Keep it simple. You will do great.

extra_audio.text: Graziele shows a guest the hospital. First, the entrance: this is the main entrance. Then, the busiest area: reception is the busiest area. Next, the most important ward: the ICU is the most important ward. After that, the most modern part: the new pharmacy is the most modern part. Finally, the widest space: the east corridor is the widest corridor.
